hero_tagline: Low cost & family friendly competitive pinball for Dallas, Fort Worth, and all of North and East Texas.
about_body:
The DFW Pinball League has been operating since 2015, offering affordable competitive pinball tournaments for players of all skill levels. Founded by Louis Marx, who has been involved in competitive pinball since 2001, the league grew from its 2013 origins at Nickelrama arcade into a thriving community.

In partnership with Carpool Pinball, we are committed to growing the DFW Pinball COMMUNITY through multiple tournament organizers and venues across North and East Texas.
info_items: Adults typically pay around $15 per event
Kids 16 and under play free at most events
Qualify for championships by playing 5 or more DFW Pinball League tournaments
